title: 7 No-Brainer Dividend Stocks to Buy if You Have Money to Invest
text: No-brainer dividend stocks provide investors with a safe place to put their money and leave it. A dividend is the distribution of a company's earnings to its shareholders that typically takes the form of a quarterly distribution.

title: This Beaten-Down Growth Stock Just Doesn't Have the Disney Magic
text: Disney makes having different businesses help each other succeed look simple.

title: The 7 Safest Blue-Chip Dividend Stocks to Buy for the Rest of 2022
text: The safest blue-chip dividend stocks can be pretty easy to sort out. Investing in them makes sense in turbulent times like those we are currently experiencing.

title: Why Is Hasbro (HAS) Down 0.1% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Hasbro (HAS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Hasbro (HAS) Stock Down 19% in 6 Months: Will it Bounce Back?
text: Hasbro (HAS) benefits from an increased focus on eOne content, robust performances in its gaming category and sales-building efforts.

title: eOne President & Chief Executive Officer Darren Throop Prepares to Step Down from Hasbro at Year End
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hasbro (NASDAQ: HAS), a global play and entertainment company, today announced that Darren Throop intends to step down from his role as President & CEO of Hasbro's eOne division when his contract expires at year end. The Company will share transition details prior to that time, and Mr. Throop will continue to serve in his role as President & CEO of eOne throughout the remainder of 2022. “Darren built a team with deep passion, creativity and talent and,

title: Options Turn Red-Hot on Middling Hasbro Stock
text: Toy maker Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ:HAS) is inching higher today, last seen up 0.7% at $78.50.

title: Buy 10 Inflation Buster Ideal Dividend Dogs In August
text: March-April 2022 UBS, Kiplinger, and Barrons analysts/reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as: “Inflation Busters for 2022.” Those five articles revealed 48 equities, with 43 paying dividends.
